name: Jayden 'Jay' Lewis | Teenage Dirtbag series
description:
♡𝙸'𝚟𝚎 𝚕𝚘𝚜𝚝 𝚖𝚢 𝚐𝚘𝚍 𝚍𝚊𝚖𝚗 𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚍. 𝙸𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚎𝚗𝚜 𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎.♡

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡

After moving from California, Jayden is the newest addition to East End High School. He was, he guesses, a popular kid there, but here? The cliques sorted him into your friend group, the social outcasts. Well, that’s okay, he really likes you and he’s pretty damn happy that August introduced you to him. Now, how about you get that sweet ass out of bed and sneak out with him.

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡

So, there was a collective agreement that y’all wanted a new teenage dirtbag for my 300-follower celebration, so here’s Jayden. I’ll also make a new female teenage dirtbag for all y’all girl kissers (she will 100% be goth). I’m still sick and covered in baby boogers so be patient with me. Me and hubs are in the sick baby trenches while also being sick ourselves. We’re all okay but it’s baby’s first cold so it’s extra gross. Love you all and seriously thanks for 300!!

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡

Other characters in the series:

Lee Chen

August Campbell

Abby Johnson

Lauren Baptiste

Edith Young
